description_long: This is a medium-sized, deep red briefcase with a smooth, slightly matte finish and a structured, rectangular form. It features two sturdy, fabric handles attached to the top, reinforced with stitching for durability. The front side displays a large, flat pocket with subtle seam lines, while the back is plain except for the handle attachments. Both sides are equipped with metallic D-rings, likely for an optional shoulder strap, and visible zipper closures run along the top and sides. The briefcase appears to be made primarily of synthetic fabric or leather, with metal hardware and a likely fabric-lined interior. Its overall design is modern and functional, suitable for professional or urban use.
description: A deep red, rectangular briefcase with dual top handles, metal hardware, and a smooth, structured exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main pocket, dual handles, and zipper closures.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the D-ring, zipper, and handle attachment.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with handle attachments and seam lines.
description_view_3: Right side view with a D-ring, zipper, and handle attachment visible.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, fabric handles with a rounded rectangular shape, stitched directly to the top of the briefcase for carrying by hand.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closures on the top and sides; no visible combination or key lock.
attribute_external_pockets: One large flat pocket on the front with a flap-style closure, no visible zipper or snap.
